agents.name: Analyst
agents.description: This Agent is responsible for analyzing the application code and providing a structured output on security findings, the bad code practices and any vulnerabilities and creating the security report in markdown format.

initial_message: I have uploaded a zip file that contains an application code. Please analyze the code thoroughly, identify all security vulnerabilities, bad coding practices, and generate a comprehensive security assessment report in markdown format. The report MUST include a structured table with the following columns: Deficiency ID, Severity, Status, Current Date, Deficiency Type, Reference, Owner, Affected Assets, Deficiency Title, Threat Description, and Proposed Mitigation. Save the report using the create_file function as 'code_security_assessment_report.md'.
